file_name: Sanchez et al. - 2023 - Clinical application of artificial intelligence for non-melanoma skin cancer.json

did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: This paper is a review article discussing the clinical application, potential, and challenges of AI in non-melanoma skin cancer. It summarizes findings from other studies (e.g., Dascalu et al., Andrew et al., Damiani et al.) but does not present original research where the authors used AI/ML/DL to obtain their own study results.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
